reviews.comment:
Siempre cargo en esta Estación de Servicio por la cercanía a mi vivienda, pero también porque los empleados son atentos, siempre preguntan si me hace falta agua, aceite o limpieza de cristales. Felicitaciones

(Translated by Google)
I always fill up at this gas station because it's close to my home, but also because the employees are attentive. They always ask if I need water, oil, or window cleaning. Congratulations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16439864451681857894/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2NXFfdkFREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención en surtidores, rápidos, no se en demás servicios porque aun no los he probado. Hay Boxes y servicompras. Ofrecen servicio de aire para neumáticos GRATIS. (Gracias por eso).

(Translated by Google)
Good service at the pumps, fast; I can't speak to the other services because I haven't tried them yet. There are self-service kiosks and convenience stores. They offer FREE tire inflation. (Thanks for that).
